title: Marketplace Manager - Porter - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Porter - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
